fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: InvestorPlace has flagged UVXY as one of ten leveraged ETFs designed to lose value, suggesting traders should avoid it. This cautionary note implies significant headwinds for the volatility-linked ETF, potentially due to structural decay or unfavorable market conditions for its strategy. Investors should be wary of its long-term viability and inherent risks.

headlines.title: Stop Trading These 10 Leveraged ETFs Built to Lose
